record.field: Remove From Follower Which User Is Archived
Remove From Follower Which User Is Archived
CAP Create a task on internal ERP

INTERNAL_ERP = 1970 SOLVED = 4 HARIKET = 913 KONSULTOO_INDIA = 246820
task = env['project.task'].create({ 'name': record.name, 'project_id': INTERNAL_ERP, 'description': record.description, 'user_ids' : [(4, HARIKET)], 'partner_id' : KONSULTOO_INDIA, }) task.message_post(body="Task created from ticket " + str(record.id)) record['stage_id'] = SOLVED record.message_post(body="Your ticket is considered as an Evolution. A Task is created in Internal ERP Project. This ticket has been closed.")
